header_variant_by_slide.title: 研究问题：表征已有，如何有效读出？
任务基础：PASTIS 多时相作物语义分割
理论依据：四篇论文构成研究链条
总体技术路线：固定 encoder，只比较 decoder
输入协议与关键工程修正
三条 decoder 路线
实验设置：公平比较与本地可复现
阶段结果：方案有效，但绝对性能仍不高
训练诊断：过拟合与 checkpoint 规则错位
阶段成果与当前证据边界

content_recipe_signatures: chart::clean-assay-report-chart-readout::Minimal scientific chart with axis labels sized for slide and source IDs.::chart::chart question|category/time labels|value series|readout/caveat|source id::Signal threshold by sample group::Control|Low|Mid::Lab chart keeps axis labels readable and source IDs compact.

comparison::clean-assay-report-comparison-frame::Raw screen vs report-ready readout or method A vs method B.::comparison-2col|split|matrix::left state|right state|decision criterion|verdict::Raw readout::Report-ready::Lab slides should make the call rule inspectable.

dashboard::clean-assay-report-dashboard-state-board::Run dashboard: samples, controls, failures, borderline calls.::lab-run-results|stats::primary metric|supporting metric|state/threshold|owner or implication::{'value': '24', 'label': 'Samples', 'detail': 'synthetic run'}|{'value': '2', 'label': 'Review calls', 'detail': 'borderline'}::{'value': '24', 'label': 'samples', 'context': 'Use run metadata, not decorative lab icons.'}

decision::clean-assay-report-decision-record::Bottom decision strip: repeat, accept, reject, or escalate.::standard|table::decision/action|evidence trigger|owner|caveat/date::Call|Rule|Action::['Pass', 'Signal >=50', 'Report']|['Review', '20-49', 'Repeat']

table::clean-assay-report-table-ledger::Lab-run-results table with pass/review/fail semantic cells.::lab-run-results|table::row entity|status/signal field|action/owner field|short source/provenance::Sample|Signal|Call::['CTRL-01', '12', 'Pass']|['LOW-04', '28', 'Review']
